device_context.host_limit: no external Mac or host assumed

local_file_write.role: generate settings, manifests and local runtime profiles

ssh_client.role: private tunnel to remote gateway when a server exists

docker_daemon.reason: iPhone/a-Shell does not provide Docker daemon semantics

root_path.reason: not writable/usable as Linux root home inside a-Shell

server_bootstrap_local_execution.reason: server bootstrap belongs on remote Ubuntu/Debian VPS, not on iPhone

public_gateway_exposure.reason: Signal gateway must stay private behind local bind, SSH tunnel or private VPN

repo_file_pull_without_git.method: python3 urllib.request direct raw GitHub download
repo_file_pull_without_git.reason: local folder may not be a valid Git working tree

validation_state.last_known_gateway_error: Connection refused on 127.0.0.1:9922 because no remote tunnel/server is active
validation_state.next_valid_action: activate private remote gateway or SSH tunnel before gateway check

safety_boundary.meaning_of_unlocked_services: project services enabled by configuration, not bypassing device or third-party restrictions
